title: FDE Session Contract
description: Versioned Field-Driven-Elicitation (Facilitated Discovery Engine) build-session aggregate (Altitude-1). Runtime-neutral: carries no runtime-specific field; adapters translate at the boundary (ADR-007). Stable reason codes reference contracts/reason-code-registry.json. Real content P330 (execution-plan.md Wave 3 row P330); state vocabulary fixed by docs/architecture.md ADR-004 and execution-plan.md section 6.3. Turn fields extended P410 (w7-requirements.md A1-001: phase, candidate primitives, unresolved questions, evidence refs, and bounded turn summaries). Pre-release tightening, NOT fully backward-compatible: turn items now REQUIRE phase and boundedSummary, so P330-era documents that carry turns do not validate unchanged; top-level additions (userFacingSummary) are optional. No persisted instances exist before Wave 8; legacy imports map through the migration manifests, never by assumed compatibility.

schemaVersion.description: Independently versioned per ADR-004; a SIC/DTC format change does not force this to bump.

status.description: execution-plan.md section 6.3 construction state machine, verbatim order. No state may be inferred from tool success or a free-text reference.

consumerOntologyId.description: Present once the session has bound a target consumer Ontology; may be absent while status is FDE_OPEN and unbound.

userFacingSummary.description: P410, A1-001: current cumulative user-facing summary of business meaning elicited so far. Absent while status is FDE_OPEN with no turns yet; a durable, structured field — never a substitute for raw transcript text.

phase.description: P410, A1-001: the construction-lane state the session was in when this turn was recorded. Same registered enum as the session-level `status` (execution-plan.md section 6.3) — never a free-text phase label.

rejected.description: Rejected/deferred hypotheses are preserved with provenance (ADR-004 Consequences), never deleted.

reasonCode.description: Stable code from contracts/reason-code-registry.json; expected context on any rejected:true turn.

candidatePrimitives.description: P410, A1-001: candidate primitive names/refs proposed in this turn. Typed pointer tokens (identifier-shaped, no whitespace) — never a raw-transcript sentence.

unresolvedQuestions.description: P410, A1-001: open questions this turn raised, still unresolved.

evidenceRefs.description: P410, A1-001/A1-003: typed pointers to evidence (session ids, decision-log ids, prompt-provenance ids). Identifier-shaped, no whitespace — raw transcript text can never satisfy this pattern, so it structurally cannot be treated as authority here.

boundedSummary.description: P410, A1-001: bounded turn summary — a short, structured summary of this turn, never the raw transcript.
